prompt: A realistic close-up editorial photograph of a French newspaper front page laid slightly diagonally on a dark tabletop, designed like a polished national daily. The masthead is a large blue rectangle with white newspaper lettering reading Le Parisien and a thin red underline. The dominant central headline, in oversized bold black serif type, reads ChatGPT Vs Gemini : Le match des images. Directly underneath, a smaller italic serif subheadline in French reads Deux intelligences artificielles s’affrontent dans une bataille visuelle sans précédent. In the center of the page, place a wide rectangular feature image showing exactly 2 futuristic boxing gloves colliding from left and right: the left glove is dark graphite and black with subtle glowing circuit patterns, the OpenAI knot logo near the wrist, and the word ChatGPT in bright white; the right glove is metallic silver-blue with luminous blue circuitry and the word Gemini in glowing blue-white. The gloves meet in the middle dramatically, lit like a high-end tech advertisement. Surrounding the main story are exactly 4 smaller newspaper teaser blocks: 2 at the top corners and 2 stacked in the right sidebar, each with dense French placeholder-style article text, thin divider lines, small page references such as "Pag. 2" or "Page 4", and some blue all-caps section tags like "LE AMIT", "LE PARISIEN", and "CONFIANTS". Add another line of italic serif text below the image repeating the visual-battle theme. Use authentic newspaper layout proportions, crisp print texture, black ink on off-white newsprint, subtle paper creases, and soft natural lighting for a believable photographed front page.
